title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Completed and committed the host/session-backed provider workstream. Implemented provider=session two-phase handoff, provider-request phase 1, ingest --provider session --provider-response phase 2, persisted request verification, request-side identity adoption, provider_host provenance, stale handoff doctor checks, cache gitignore protection, phase-2 mismatch warnings, shared provider JSON parsing, README/contract docs, a generic session-provider sub-agent prompt, and Claude review fixes. Latest review fixes: primary phase-2 request lookup now uses the safe request-path guard, missing-response request lookup preserves original provider failures for invalid response stems, regressions cover traversal with an existing escaped request target and malformed arbitrary response paths, and the contract notes cwd-resolved bad relative paths. Commits landed: 802d190, d3af40f, 853a556, e4e8696, 5e6b15b. Verification: uv run pytest => 111 passed; uv run python -m py_compile src/meeting_ingest/*.py src/meeting_ingest/providers/*.py => passed. Working tree clean.
next_actions: Continue with optional host-specific wrapper snippets for Codex/Claude Code/Supa Code that fill REQUEST_PATH, RESPONSE_PATH, HOST_NAME, and MODEL_ID automatically, or run another review over 5e6b15b if desired.
